display_notes.en: This test does not decide why a pair appears; it checks whether residual panel repetition remains after removing the target pair.
display_notes.zh: 本測試不判斷原因，只檢查扣除目標配對後的 residual panel 是否仍有重複與分層集中。

en: A+B can explain the pair. It does not automatically explain the rest of the panel.
This test removes the target pair and checks whether the remaining panel members still concentrate across cases.
zh: A+B 可以解釋專家配對。不能自動解釋剩餘席次。
本測試扣除目標 pair 後，檢查剩餘席次是否仍跨案件集中。
本測試不生成法律結論。

method.baseline_c: matched amount tier and procurement method
method.core_question: after removing a target expert pair, whether residual panel repetition remains visible
method.residual_panel: all case reviewers excluding the target pair

source_scope.amount_tier_rule: log amount ranked tertile; budget amount preferred with award amount fallback

baselines.match_note: all high-budget cases excluding target pair cases
